spec.name: compute_crc32
spec.description: Computes the CRC-32 checksum of a file on disk and returns it as an unsigned integer.

path.description: The absolute path to the file.

spec.implementation_notes: Use Python's zlib.crc32(data) & 0xFFFFFFFF to ensure an unsigned 32-bit integer.

request.rationale: The existing file reading tools (file_read, read_file) are returning truncated content in the observation history, making it impossible to compute an accurate CRC-32 checksum of the full file 'app.log' locally. A dedicated tool that computes the checksum directly on the file system avoids data transfer limits.
